profile.name: Divya Nirankari
profile.summary: Python and AI/ML Engineer with 3+ years of experience building production-ready machine learning systems, with a deep focus on Healthcare AI and biomedical signal processing. At Logixbuilt Infotech, I developed high-throughput REST APIs (10k+ daily requests, 99.9% uptime) and reduced database response times by 40% through PostgreSQL query optimisation. As a freelance engineer, I have designed ECG cardiac abnormality detection models achieving 94% F1-score using 1D CNN and ResNet architectures on the PhysioNet dataset, and built real-time AI-powered chatbots integrated across WhatsApp, Telegram, and Messenger. I am currently authoring a research paper on deep learning-based ECG analysis and am actively studying Japanese, with the goal of contributing to Japan's world-class AI research and healthcare technology ecosystem.
profile.bio: As a seasoned software development expert, I possess a unique ability to craft and deploy high-performance, scalable web applications that harness the power of cutting-edge technologies, including the design and implementation of innovative machine learning models that catalyze business growth, optimize operational efficiency, and inform strategic decision-making, ultimately driving transformative outcomes and propelling organizations forward.

about: I am an Artificial Intelligence Engineer deeply passionate about Healthcare AI and biomedical signal analysis. My work revolves around developing intelligent deep learning models for real-world medical applications, such as detecting cardiac abnormalities from ECG signals and identifying early-stage Parkinson's disease.

With a research-oriented mindset, I thrive on designing scalable, data-driven systems that make a tangible impact on early diagnosis and patient care. I am constantly seeking new avenues to push the boundaries of advanced AI research and deliver transformative healthcare solutions.

researchInterests.description: Focused on applying deep learning to ECG and EEG signals for early disease detection and health monitoring.
Exploring QNN architectures for enhanced feature extraction in high-dimensional medical datasets.

blogPosts.title: A Gentle Introduction to Graph Neural Networks
blogPosts.content: Neural networks have been adapted to leverage the structure and properties of graphs. We explore the components needed for building a graph neural network - and motivate the design choices behind them.

bullets: Developed REST APIs using FastAPI handling 10k+ daily requests with 99.9% uptime.

Built real-time chatbot system integrated with WhatsApp, Telegram, Facebook Messenger.

Architected scalable backend systems with Redis caching and PostgreSQL data pipelines.

profile.name: Divya Nirankari
profile.summary: Python and AI/ML Engineer with 3+ years of experience building production-ready machine learning systems, with a deep focus on Healthcare AI and biomedical signal processing. At Logixbuilt Infotech, I developed high-throughput REST APIs (10k+ daily requests, 99.9% uptime) and reduced database response times by 40% through PostgreSQL query optimisation. As a freelance engineer, I have designed ECG cardiac abnormality detection models achieving 94% F1-score using 1D CNN and ResNet architectures on the PhysioNet dataset, and built real-time AI-powered chatbots integrated across WhatsApp, Telegram, and Messenger. I am currently authoring a research paper on deep learning-based ECG analysis and am actively studying Japanese, with the goal of contributing to Japan's world-class AI research and healthcare technology ecosystem.
profile.bio: As a seasoned software development expert, I possess a unique ability to craft and deploy high-performance, scalable web applications that harness the power of cutting-edge technologies, including the design and implementation of innovative machine learning models that catalyze business growth, optimize operational efficiency, and inform strategic decision-making, ultimately driving transformative outcomes and propelling organizations forward.

profile.name: Divya Nirankari
profile.summary: Python and AI/ML Engineer with 3+ years of experience building production-ready machine learning systems, with a deep focus on Healthcare AI and biomedical signal processing. At Logixbuilt Infotech, I developed high-throughput REST APIs (10k+ daily requests, 99.9% uptime) and reduced database response times by 40% through PostgreSQL query optimisation. As a freelance engineer, I have designed ECG cardiac abnormality detection models achieving 94% F1-score using 1D CNN and ResNet architectures on the PhysioNet dataset, and built real-time AI-powered chatbots integrated across WhatsApp, Telegram, and Messenger. I am currently authoring a research paper on deep learning-based ECG analysis and am actively studying Japanese, with the goal of contributing to Japan's world-class AI research and healthcare technology ecosystem.
profile.bio: As a seasoned software development expert, I possess a unique ability to craft and deploy high-performance, scalable web applications that harness the power of cutting-edge technologies, including the design and implementation of innovative machine learning models that catalyze business growth, optimize operational efficiency, and inform strategic decision-making, ultimately driving transformative outcomes and propelling organizations forward.

personal.self_pr_ja: Python・AI/MLエンジニアとして、医療AI分野に特化した実務経験を持ちます。ECG信号を用いた心臓異常検知モデル（1D CNN / ResNet、F1スコア94%）や、FastAPIを活用したスケーラブルなバックエンドシステムの開発に携わってまいりました。現在、日本語を積極的に学習中であり、日本の先進的なAI研究・開発環境において貢献したいと考えています。
personal.self_pr_ja_detailed: Python・AI/MLエンジニアとして約3年の実務経験を有し、医療AIおよびバックエンド開発に注力してまいりました。Logixbuilt Infotech社ではFastAPIによるREST API開発・PostgreSQLクエリ最適化・自動テストパイプライン構築に従事し、フリーランスとして国際的なクライアント向けにPyTorchを用いた本番環境MLモデルの設計・ECG心臓異常検知システム（1D ResNet、PhysioNetデータセット使用）の開発を担当しました。現在は1D ResNetを用いた心臓異常検知に関する研究論文を執筆中です。在学中には「Data Structure Excellence Award」「Student of the Year」等の学業表彰を受けており、日本の医療AI・ヘルスケアテック分野でその専門性を活かし、社会に貢献することを目指しています。
personal.career_summary_ja: Python・AI/MLエンジニアとして約3年の実務経験を有し、医療AIおよびバックエンド開発に注力してまいりました。Logixbuilt Infotech社ではFastAPIによるREST API開発・PostgreSQLクエリ最適化・自動テストパイプライン構築に従事し、フリーランスとして国際的なクライアント向けにPyTorchを用いた本番環境MLモデルの設計・ECG心臓異常検知システム（1D ResNet、PhysioNetデータセット使用）の開発を担当しました。現在は1D ResNetを用いた心臓異常検知に関する研究論文を執筆中であり、日本の医療AI・ヘルスケアテック分野でその専門性を活かし、社会に貢献することを目指しています。

about: I am an Artificial Intelligence Engineer deeply passionate about Healthcare AI and biomedical signal analysis. My work revolves around developing intelligent deep learning models for real-world medical applications, such as detecting cardiac abnormalities from ECG signals and identifying early-stage Parkinson's disease.

With a research-oriented mindset, I thrive on designing scalable, data-driven systems that make a tangible impact on early diagnosis and patient care. I am constantly seeking new avenues to push the boundaries of advanced AI research and deliver transformative healthcare solutions.

profile.name: Divya Nirankari
profile.summary: Python and AI/ML Engineer with 3+ years of experience building production-ready machine learning systems, with a deep focus on Healthcare AI and biomedical signal processing. At Logixbuilt Infotech, I developed high-throughput REST APIs (10k+ daily requests, 99.9% uptime) and reduced database response times by 40% through PostgreSQL query optimisation. As a freelance engineer, I have designed ECG cardiac abnormality detection models achieving 94% F1-score using 1D CNN and ResNet architectures on the PhysioNet dataset, and built real-time AI-powered chatbots integrated across WhatsApp, Telegram, and Messenger. I am currently authoring a research paper on deep learning-based ECG analysis and am actively studying Japanese, with the goal of contributing to Japan's world-class AI research and healthcare technology ecosystem.

about: I am an Artificial Intelligence Engineer deeply passionate about Healthcare AI and biomedical signal analysis. My work revolves around developing intelligent deep learning models for real-world medical applications, such as detecting cardiac abnormalities from ECG signals and identifying early-stage Parkinson's disease.

With a research-oriented mindset, I thrive on designing scalable, data-driven systems that make a tangible impact on early diagnosis and patient care. I am constantly seeking new avenues to push the boundaries of advanced AI research and deliver transformative healthcare solutions.

projects.name: Deep Learning for Cardiac Abnormality Detection Using Wearable ECG Data
projects.summary: Applied signal preprocessing techniques (noise filtering, normalization, segmentation) for cardiac abnormalities using ECG signals. Implemented deep learning models CNN and 1D ResNet for time-series classification. Optimized model performance for early-stage abnormality detection.
projects.techStack: Python, TensorFlow/PyTorch, NumPy, SciPy, CNN, 1D ResNet

projects.name: Parkinson’s Disease Detection System
projects.summary: Developed an AI-Based System based on Spiral Drawing Analysis. Applied image processing and machine learning techniques. Identified early-stage Parkinson’s symptoms.

projects.name: AI-Based Disease Prediction System
projects.summary: Built ML models to predict diseases using patient datasets. Applied classification algorithms and feature engineering. Improved accuracy through data preprocessing and model tuning.

projects.name: Chatbot Cloud Project
projects.summary: Built a real-time chatbot system integrated with WhatsApp, Telegram, and Facebook Messenger. Implemented AI-based intent recognition and fallback responses. Optimized API with Redis Cache, WebSocket Auto-Reconnect, and Query Indexing.
projects.techStack: AI, Redis, WebSockets, K6, ChatGPT API

projects.name: Financial Portfolio Management Project
projects.summary: Implemented AI-based risk assessment and asset allocation. Utilized historical financial data for market trend forecasting. Provided real-time investment tracking through dashboards.

projects.name: DropIt.my - Delivery Platform
projects.summary: Developed backend APIs for a logistics platform. Implemented delivery scheduling algorithms and tracking system. Optimized database queries for real-time logistics management and performance.

projects.name: Carefare Services – On-Demand Services Platform

cover_letter.growth_background: As a dedicated Artificial Intelligence Engineer, my academic foundation in computer science and passion for engineering have propelled me towards a career in Healthcare AI and biomedical signal analysis. With a strong professional evolution, I have developed expertise in designing intelligent deep learning models for real-world medical applications.
cover_letter.strengths_weaknesses: My core technical strengths lie in Python programming, AI/ML engineering, and data-driven system design. With a problem-solving mindset and professional discipline, I thrive on delivering scalable solutions that drive tangible impact on early diagnosis and patient care, while continuously seeking avenues for growth and improvement.
cover_letter.motivation: I am driven to contribute to the global tech ecosystem and lead technical innovation in Healthcare AI, leveraging my expertise to make a meaningful difference in people's lives. My motivation stems from the potential of AI to revolutionize medical applications and improve patient outcomes, and I am eager to collaborate with like-minded professionals to push the boundaries of advanced AI research.
cover_letter.goals_after_joining: Upon joining, my specific technical goals include developing and implementing cutting-edge AI solutions for real-world medical applications, while fostering a culture of innovation and collaboration. My long-term vision is to establish myself as a thought leader in Healthcare AI, driving transformative solutions that enhance patient care and outcomes, and delivering significant value to the company through my expertise and dedication.
